error_server_desc: The server is experiencing issues. Please try again later.
error_network_desc: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
error_too_many_requests_desc: Please wait before reloading the page. The server is under heavy load.
error_server_overloaded_desc: Please try again in a few seconds.
error_request_timeout: The request took too long. Please check your connection.
error_network_fallback: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
error_permission_denied: You do not have permission to access.
